name: Suspicious Browser-Initiated Script Execution Identified via Microsoft Telemetry
description: Microsoft telemetry detection identifying instances where a web browser launches command-line or scripting interpreters including PowerShell, CMD, WScript, CScript, or MSHTA. Such behavior is uncommon for legitimate browsing activity and may indicate malicious drive-by downloads, script injection, or abuse of browser-based execution chains.

filterSets.name: Suspicious Browser-Initiated Script Execution Identified via Microsoft Telemetry

author: Lorenzo Laureano
